name: SPLIT NOTOCHORD SYNDROME
definition: spectrum of anomalies with persistent connection between gut + dorsal ectoderm

demographics.Etiology: failure of complete separation of ectoderm from endoderm with subsequent splitting
demographics.Location: intraspinal in lower cervical / upper thoracic region

dominant_finding: enlarged spinal canal at site of cyst
distribution: intraspinal in lower cervical / upper thoracic region
discriminating_features: fistula / isolated diverticula / duplication / cyst / fibrous cord / sinus along the tract
dorsal bowel hernia into a skin- / membrane-covered dorsal sac after passing through a
enlarged spinal canal at site of cyst
hemivertebrae, segmentation defect, partial fusion, scoliosis in region of cyst

general: fistula / isolated diverticula / duplication / cyst / fibrous cord / sinus along the tract
dorsal bowel hernia into a skin- / membrane-covered dorsal sac after passing through a
enlarged spinal canal at site of cyst
hemivertebrae, segmentation defect, partial fusion, scoliosis in region of cyst
